expected.notes: CPT application and I-20 both show identical student name, so comparison status is match not mismatch, preventing the rule from firing.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'cpt_application_i20_student_name_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.cpt_application_i20_student_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
